headline: Tesla sinks 6% despite strong deliveries
detail: When good news can't hold a stock, momentum is broken. Tesla is a sentiment bellwether for high-multiple tech and EV-adjacent names. A spillover into QQQ and SMH tomorrow is a real risk worth watching given your concentration.
rec: No action from this headline alone - but if QQQ breaks toward $700 or SMH softens further, your stops at $670 and $540 become the relevant levels to respect. No new buys triggered.

headline: Russia massive strike on Ukraine, Poland scrambles jets
detail: Hard geopolitical escalation spooks risk appetite fast, especially for levered and momentum-heavy names. Your book is nearly 90% tech on margin - a sudden risk-off move hits you disproportionately hard.
rec: No action today, but this is a tail risk that argues against adding margin exposure right now. Keep stops firm on SOXL and SPAL; do not add leverage into an active geopolitical flare.

headline: Autonomous drone startup Quantum Systems raises $1.2B in defense
detail: Defense tech money is flowing - this is a data point that defense/autonomy is attracting serious capital. Tangential to your chip names since defense AI runs on semis, but no direct holding is impacted today.
rec: No action - you have no defense-specific exposure and no scanner setup supports a new entry here. File as context: defense AI tailwind is a longer-term reason to stay patient with SMH.

headline: Stock market gains minted nearly 1 million new millionaires in 2025
detail: Confirms the 2025 bull run is broadly real, which is supportive sentiment for your QQQ and SPY positions. However, it also signals crowded positioning - latecomers piling in can mean fragility if sentiment shifts.
rec: No action - QQQ and SPY are your two green positions and both are above their stops. Hold them; this headline does not change anything today.
